nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=210 beats='{HERO} boards {THRESHOLD} at {OPENING_MOMENT}; {ENTRANCE}'s clock has already stopped; four ways to read this strange, half-empty train open before her'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=165 beats='{HERO} turns toward {G0A0_CHAR}; {TONE_MOTIF}; a first detail snags her attention'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='{G0A0_CHAR} offers {HERO} two ways to read it; one is direct and risks notice, the other is patient and lets {THRESHOLD} keep its secret a while'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=150 beats='the direct approach to {G0A0_CHAR} yields a hard, specific fact that will not sit still in {HERO}'s mind; it points deeper into {THRESHOLD}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=175 beats='watching {G0A0_CHAR} from the edges, {HERO} can either fold the observation into what she already knows, or let the late hour and the motion pull her under before she has understood it'>>

choices.label: Hold the thread and go on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='both readings of {G0A0_CHAR} converge on the same small wrongness; {HERO} feels the journey close around it like a held breath'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='carrying what {G0A0_CHAR} has told her, {HERO} moves on through the swaying cars toward {GOAL}'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=150 beats='the pull of {G0A0_CHAR} closes over {HERO} before she can hold it; she surfaces later having missed the moment, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=165 beats='{HERO} turns toward {G3A2_CHAR}; {TONE_MOTIF}; a first detail snags her attention'>>

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='both readings of {G3A3_CHAR} converge on the same small wrongness; {HERO} feels the journey close around it like a held breath'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='carrying what {G3A3_CHAR} has told her, {HERO} moves on through the swaying cars toward {GOAL}'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=150 beats='the pull of {G3A3_CHAR} closes over {HERO} before she can hold it; she surfaces later having missed the moment, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood'>>

<<FILL role=pivot words=205 beats='the first bottleneck, why {THRESHOLD} never seems to arrive; every clock aboard has stopped and {TERMINUS} stays exactly one hour off, no matter how long the night runs'>>

<<FILL role=pivot words=205 beats='the second bottleneck, who the passengers really are; each traveller seems to be riding for a reason older than tonight, and none of them will say where they first got on'>>

<<FILL role=pivot words=205 beats='the third bottleneck, the choice at {DEADLINE}; {THRESHOLD} slows before {DEADLINE} and {HERO} must decide what she will carry through the dark, and what she will leave'>>

<<FILL role=pivot words=205 beats='the passengers reveal themselves as {DEADLINE_SIGN} touches the peaks; {HERO} understands {THRESHOLD} is a passage and not a route, and that how the night ends is now hers to shape'>>

choices.label: Ride on and simply be present.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='{HERO} gives herself to {R_PEACE_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='in {R_PEACE_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='having chosen {R_PEACE_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather'>>
<<FILL role=setback words=150 beats='the calm {HERO} finds is real but slips through her fingers before {DEADLINE_SIGN}; she arrives unsettled, sure only that she let a moment pass'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='{HERO} gives herself to {R_HELP_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='in {R_HELP_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='having chosen {R_HELP_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather'>>
<<FILL role=setback words=150 beats='{HERO} hesitates one beat too long and the hand she meant to take is withdrawn; the traveler rides on alone and so does she'>>

ending.title: The Hand You Did Not Take

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='{HERO} gives herself to {R_TRUTH_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='in {R_TRUTH_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='having chosen {R_TRUTH_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather'>>
<<FILL role=discovery words=175 beats='{HERO} reads half {G3A3_LURE}'s secret and no more; it is enough to know {THRESHOLD} is kind, not enough to know why it chose her'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='{HERO} gives herself to {R_LEAVE_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='in {R_LEAVE_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='having chosen {R_LEAVE_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather'>>
<<FILL role=setback words=150 beats='the door opens onto the first {ENTRANCE} of all, and {HERO} wakes there as {THRESHOLD} pulls away northward without her, the night unspent'>>

<<FILL role=pivot words=200 beats='every route through the night gathers at {DEADLINE_SIGN} bottleneck above {DEADLINE}; the peaks go gold, the passengers are quiet, and the last shape of {HERO}'s journey waits on one final turning'>>

choices.label: Set the night down and stay.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=190 beats='{HERO} stops trying to arrive; she lets {TERMINUS} stay one hour off forever and finds, at last, that she does not mind the distance'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='the seat beside the mourning traveler is warm; {HERO} can stay through {DEADLINE} at the price of her own arrival, or step back and keep it'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=190 beats='{HERO} speaks {TERMINUS}'s whole quiet truth aloud to the grey window, and the naming of it is its own kind of arrival'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=185 beats='{HERO} asks {THRESHOLD} for nothing but a safe waking, and {THRESHOLD}, being kinder than she feared, grants exactly that and no more'>>

<<FILL role=success words=220 beats='the best ending: {HERO} rides {THRESHOLD} with open eyes and an open heart, at peace with a journey that was never meant to end at a station; {DEADLINE_SIGN} holds and she is finally, wholly here'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=215 beats='{HERO} stays beside the mourning traveler through {DEADLINE} and delivers her safely into {DEADLINE_SIGN}; helping another home turns out to be the arrival {HERO} was riding toward all along'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=150 beats='{HERO} stays past every reasonable hour and {DEADLINE_SIGN} slips by; the traveler is helped but {HERO} surfaces frayed and far from herself, the good deed shadowed by what it cost'>>

<<FILL role=discovery words=185 beats='{HERO} names {TERMINUS} for what it is, a passage the season lends to travelers who are ready; she does not stay, but she leaves knowing, and the knowing settles something in her'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=165 beats='{HERO} wakes at her own quiet station, unharmed and a little haunted; {THRESHOLD} is gone, the night unexplained, and she carries only the sense of a door she chose not to walk through'>>
